tagline: Locally owned Santa Rosa electricians for panels, EV chargers, and remodels.
seoDescription: Gratto Electric is a locally owned, licensed electrical contractor in Santa Rosa led by owner Scott — panel upgrades, EV charging stations, generator hookups, lighting, and remodel wiring across Sonoma County.
heroHeading: Santa Rosa electricians, owner on the job
heroSubheading: Gratto Electric is a locally owned, licensed electrical contractor handling panel upgrades, EV charging, generators, and remodel wiring across Sonoma County — with owner Scott personally on the work.
highlights: Licensed, insured electrical contractor — locally owned & operated
Roughly a decade of electrical experience in Sonoma County
Panel upgrades, EV charging & generator hookups a specialty
New construction, remodels, lighting & A/C circuits
aboutHeading: An electrician who answers the phone
aboutBody: Gratto Electric is a locally owned and operated electrical contractor based in Santa Rosa, run by owner Scott with roughly a decade of experience in the trade. The work spans everything a Sonoma County home or remodel needs — from a simple lighting circuit to a full panel upgrade.

Neighbors know Scott for professional, high-quality workmanship and for being a straightforward, trusted resource. As homes add electric vehicles, generators, and hot tubs, Gratto Electric handles the panel capacity, EV charging stations, and transfer switches that make it all work safely.

services.title: Electrical Panel Upgrades
services.description: Service and panel upgrades that add the capacity modern homes need, done to code and inspected.

services.title: EV Charging Station Installation
services.description: Level 2 EV charger installs sized and wired correctly for your vehicle and your panel.

services.title: Generator Hookups & Transfer Switches
services.description: Standby and portable generator hookups with transfer switches so the lights stay on.

services.title: Lighting Installation
services.description: Interior and exterior lighting, recessed cans, and fixtures installed cleanly.

services.title: New Construction & Remodel Wiring
services.description: Full wiring for new builds, additions, and kitchen and bath remodels.

services.title: A/C & Hot Tub Circuits
services.description: Dedicated circuits and hookups for air conditioning and hot tubs.

testimonials.quote: Scott is professional and does high-quality workmanship — a trusted resource in the community.
testimonials.author: Verified Nextdoor recommendation · Santa Rosa
